notes: Patterns ported from the original Cashiro SelcomPesaParser.kt (parser-core/src/main/kotlin/com/ritesh/parser/core/bank/SelcomPesaParser.kt). Selcom Pesa is a Tanzanian mobile-money wallet; transaction SMSes lead with a reference id followed by "Confirmed."/"Accepted." and a "You have received/sent/paid/withdrawn TZS ..." narrative, ending with "Updated balance is TZS ...". Card payments and ATM withdrawals carry "card ending [with] NNNN". The Kotlin isTransactionMessage requires BOTH a confirmed/accepted marker AND an action keyword; the manifest filter expresses the action keywords and a pipeline rejectWhen downgrades messages missing "confirmed"/"accepted" (REVIEW rather than a hard REJECT — closest engine-expressible approximation). Like JioPay, wallet transactions without a card carry no account number, so accountLast4 falls back to "0000" to route to the linked wallet provider account (the Kotlin parser returned null).

fixtures.body: 0426JXCX Confirmed. You have received TZS 175,000.00 from MICHAEL EMIL LUYANGI - NMB (201100XXXXX) on 2025-04-26 11:50. Updated balance is TZS 175,000.00. Help 0800 714 888 / 0800 784 888
